summary: Hard-fail in bin/stampede.sh when --metaswarm is set and resolved MODEL/MODELS contains any banned model; rewrite or reject before pane build. Also flip default MODEL outside metaswarm away from claude-haiku-4.5 if non-metaswarm should be free of banned defaults.

Emit explicit commander-NNN.json manifest into .stampede/{run_id}/queue/ in metaswarm mode with task_id, run_id, repo_path, objective, profile, swarm_scale, per_commander_full_swarm, model_policy, premium_model_pool, banned_sub_agent_models, constraints, collaboration_required. Avoid contract drift between launcher-emitted state and agent doc by syncing field names (telemetry_contract, collab aliases).

Add child-agents.jsonl tailing + tolerant JSONL parsing to bin/stampede-monitor.sh so Agent Pulse derives live counts from append-only ledger, not just swarm-state.json. Add dedicated commander pulse panel using last_heartbeat_at with explicit stuck threshold.

Atomically create state.json at launch (profile, count, repo, run_id, started_at). Document temp+rename pattern for both bundle.json and results/{task_id}.json in agent doc. Add adopted_consensus_item_ids and source_refs to bundle shape example.
Add explicit instruction in stampede-commander.agent.md to update last_heartbeat_at periodically and on phase changes so monitor stuck detection is contractually guaranteed.

Synthesis-readiness confirms blockers: (1) bundle.json lacks adopted_consensus_item_ids/source_refs fields required by launcher prompt; (2) swarm-state.json telemetry depends on commander self-reporting - no external validation; (3) launch proof requires 250 workers but platform limits may force partial status; (4) bundle schema discrepancies between worker/commander status vocabularies.
evidence: sq-001 found missing item_ids/source_refs in bundle schema
Telemetry accuracy depends on real-time state updates

summary: Terminology inconsistency: 'sub-agent' and 'child agent' are used interchangeably. File is named child-agents.jsonl but monitor warns about 'sub-agent proof'. Recommend standardizing on 'sub-agent' for user-facing text and 'child_agent' for programmatic identifiers.
evidence: sq-041 found 5 instances of mixed terminology across stampede.sh, monitor, and commander agent

summary: Replace concurrent in-place swarm-state mutations with a ledger-derived reducer or file lock so launch proof cannot be lost under child concurrency.
evidence: This run produced 33 squad launch_started records in child-agents.jsonl while swarm-state currently reports squad_leads_started=0 and task_id=null
